title: How to Use Claude Cowork (Step-by-Step) | AI Agent on Your Computer
summary: Claude Cowork is an AI agent that runs on desktop computers and automates daily tasks by interacting with files, emails, calendars, and applications. The tutorial covers installation, setup, real-world use cases including file organization and workflow automation, and demonstrates scheduling tasks and calendar integration via Gmail and Google Calendar connectors.
